title: [Update 0.16.3]
raw_body: - Update for server list, future servers should show up automatically - We have setup 2 SEA servers, we will be setting up another EU, NA and SEA server soon Fixes and Improvements - Fix Rage not working on Berserker - Vending list now automatically populates when opening
added: 2 SEA servers (more EU / NA / SEA servers coming soon)
Server list now auto-populates for future servers
fixed: Rage skill not working on Berserker
Vending list now automatically populates when opened
